schema_note: Target buckets for outreach. Bucket 'cardiac_recipients' = healthcare AI / cardiology AI / health-tech leaders who'd care about the cardiac retrieval teardown when published. Bucket 'ai_pain_complaints' = LinkedIn / X / public posts where someone is venting about RAG/agent/AI production failure. Each entry = candidate to be contacted or commented on. Update as targets are surfaced via search.

cardiac_recipients.criteria: Decision-makers or near-decision-makers with budget exposure to clinical AI / cardiology AI; titles like Director of Clinical AI, VP Healthcare AI, Chief Medical Information Officer, Chief AI Officer; or technical leads on cardiology-flavored AI products.
search_queries_to_run_manually_on_linked: ("clinical decision support" OR "CDS") AND (RAG OR retrieval) AND (cardiology OR cardiac)

ai_pain_complaints.criteria: Public posts (LinkedIn, X, Reddit, HN, Medium, Substack) where someone vents about RAG / agent / AI / eval failure modes in production. The OP is the lead. Comment with substance, end with profile signal toward landing page. Medium articles whose authors are reachable via LinkedIn are a particularly good substrate.

platform_notes.Towards Data Science: Spun off from Medium early 2026. NO comment system on articles. Reader profiles are name-only (no bio field for non-authors). Route engagement via LinkedIn DM to author instead — most TDS authors link their LinkedIn from the article footer. Same play applies to any paywall/comment-killed publication.
platform_notes.Medium: Comments enabled by default. Body links allowed (less algo-suppressive than LinkedIn). Comment-then-author-LinkedIn-cross-link is the conversion path.
platform_notes.LinkedIn: Comments + posts both work. Body links are algo-suppressed; first-comment links get ~2x organic reach. DM with substantive note is the conversion-path move when someone is venting in a post.
platform_notes.Substack: Comments often enabled for subscribers; subscribing first costs nothing and unlocks comment ability. Author DMs not always exposed.
platform_notes.HN: Karma-gated. Body links from low-karma accounts auto-flag. Profile-bio-link-only is the safer route. See reddit_shadowban_playbook.md for the equivalent karma-build pattern.

candidates.author: Emmimal P Alexander
candidates.title: RAG Hallucinates - I Built a Self-Healing Layer That Fixes It in Real Time
candidates.subtitle: How a silent production failure led me to build a detection pipeline that catches, fixes, and routes hallucinations before users ever see them
candidates.linkedin_headline: AI Engineer & Author | Agentic AI Systems | Neural Networks & Deep Learning
candidates.url: (Kevin to capture from TDS when reading)
candidates.fit_reason: AI Engineer & Author with own technical brand (EmiTechLogic); Bengaluru-based IC role with India-scaled comp = unlikely $15K audit buyer; she's actively BUILDING in the space (her own self-healing detection pipeline); 1,530 followers in AI/agentic-AI = real peer-amplifier reach. Treat as substance-discussion peer, NOT prospect.

touchpoints.action: connection request sent with 245-char peer-substance note referencing 'silent production failure' phrase + LangChain teardown 5/6 finding

candidates.next_action: Wait for accept. If she accepts + warm-close reply (Nweke pattern): thumbs-up + content-led nurture. If she accepts + substantive reply (asks about retrieval-auditor / Bell Tuning method): swap teardown notes peer-to-peer, NO audit pitch (she's not a buyer; she's a builder + amplifier). If she asks about her own pipeline vs Bell Tuning: be honest about complementary scope, do NOT compete. If silent 7-14d: drop direct outreach, content-led nurture only.
candidates.draft_connection_note: Read your "RAG Hallucinates / Self-Healing Layer" on TDS. The "silent production failure" framing maps to what I've built - retrieval-auditor flagged 5/6 LangChain quickstart queries via rank inversion + score miscal. Wrote it up if useful.
candidates.amplifier_engagement_path: If accept happens: comment substantively on her TDS article (public, not DM) once she's connected, with the kind of substance peer reply she'd value. Public engagement = her audience sees Kevin's voice. Don't pitch in the comment. If she likes/replies/shares Kevin's LinkedIn substance posts: real signal, peer-relationship is forming. Long-tail value > short-tail audit conversion.

touchpoints.action: connection accepted; Benjamin replied warmly: '👏👍😊 Ha exactly, we all can relate to one thing or the other. I'm glad you enjoyed your read Kevin. I've accepted your connection request so definitely we would always be in touch. Cheers!' — closing-vibe message, no ask
Kevin sent thumbs-up reaction; conversation cleanly closed on warm note, no push, no link sent

candidates.next_action: DO NOT push followup DM. Connection established + warm-closed. The 'wrote it up if useful' teaser in connect note got no bite — respect the non-ask. Pivot to content-led nurture: Benjamin sees Kevin's LinkedIn posts in feed organically. If a post lands with his thesis (Native Agent Architectures, RAG production failure modes, observability ceiling), HE re-opens the thread on his timing. Watch his feed for any like/comment/share signal on Kevin's posts as the re-engagement gate. No action item from Kevin's side until that happens.
candidates.draft_connection_note: Read your 'Native Agent Architectures' piece on TDS. Your 3-hour memory-module debug matched exactly what I found when I audited LangChain's RAG quickstart with a distributional grader — 5 of 6 queries flagged silent retrieval pathology. Wrote it up if useful.
